recommendations.title: Children of the Corn: Revelation
recommendations.overview: When calls to her grandmother go unanswered, Jamie Lowell uncovers the truth behind her mysterious disappearance.

recommendations.title: Wildling
recommendations.overview: A young woman held in captivity discovers the realities of truth and lies in the outside world.

recommendations.title: Jamie Marks Is Dead
recommendations.overview: No one seemed to care about Jamie Marks until after his death. Hoping to find the love and friendship he never had in life, Jamie’s ghost visits former classmate Adam McCormick, drawing him into the bleak world between the living and the dead.

recommendations.title: A Walk to Remember

recommendations.title: Dead Silence

recommendations.title: Nightbreed
recommendations.overview: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity. Meanwhile, a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy.

recommendations.title: Bring Her Back
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their father, a brother and sister are sent to live with a foster mother, only to learn that she is hiding a terrifying secret.
